name: Compare workers comp Utah vs Idaho for job injuries?

mainEntity.name: Compare workers comp Utah vs Idaho for job injuries?

acceptedAnswer.text: Similar no-fault; Utah longer report, both 1-yr file.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Both no-fault, Utah 1-year file/180-day report, Idaho 1-year/60-day; Utah 66 2/3% wages cap $800+/wk, Idaho similar but 91% max. Utah stricter impairment ratings.[1][2]

| Aspect | Utah | Idaho |
|--------|------|------|
| File Limit | 1 yr | 1 yr |
| Report | 180d | 60d |
| Wage % | 66 2/3 | 66 2/3 |
Utah more litigation-heavy; both attorney helpful. Check state commission.

description: Similar no-fault; Utah longer report, both 1-yr file.[1][2]
